Feature
Request
buttons.text:
### Request: [FEATURE NAME]

**Ziel:**
[WAS SOLL ERREICHT WERDEN?]

**Requirements:**

- [ ] Requirement 3

**Constraints:**
- [EINSCHRÄNKUNGEN]

**Tools:**

- [x] Check Protected Paths

**Plan:**
[x] Zeig mir erst den Plan

**Testing:**

buttons.name:
Bug
Fix
buttons.text:
### Bug Fix: [PROBLEM]

**Symptom:**
[WAS FUNKTIONIERT NICHT?]

**Error Message:**
```
[ERROR]
```

**Location:**
- File: [PATH]
- Function: [NAME]

**Expected Behavior:**
[WAS SOLLTE PASSIEREN?]

**Tools:**
- [x] BFAgent MCP Protected Paths checken

buttons.name: Refactor
buttons.text:
### Refactoring: [COMPONENT]

**Ziel:**
[WARUM REFACTOREN?]

**Scope:**
- Domain: [DOMAIN]
- Component: [TYPE]

**Safety Checks:**
- [x] BFAgent MCP: get_refactor_options('[DOMAIN]')
- [x] BFAgent MCP: check_path_protection()
- [x] BFAgent MCP: get_best_practices()

**Plan:**
[x] Zeig mir erst den Plan

buttons.name: Checkpoint
buttons.text:
@CASCADE: Checkpoint

- Was ist der Stand?
- Was fehlt noch?
- Welche Requirements sind noch offen?

buttons.name:

Request
buttons.text:

**Frage:**
[WAS MÖCHTE ICH WISSEN?]

**Nutze:**
- [ ] code_search
- [ ] BFAgent MCP: search_handlers
- [ ] BFAgent MCP: get_domain

**Don't code yet - investigation only**

buttons.name:
Golden
Rules
buttons.text:
REQUIREMENTS FIRST → Liste was du willst
PLAN BEFORE CODE → "Zeig mir erst den Plan"
USE BFAGENT MCP → "Check mit BFAgent MCP"
